businessQuestion: Which regions have experienced the largest decline in sales compared to last year?
sqlAnswer:
WITH REGION_SALES AS (
SELECT
    DS.REGION,
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
    SUM(NET_SALES_AMT) AS SALES
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
ON FS.STORE_KEY=DS.STORE_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_DATE DD
ON FS.DATE_KEY=DD.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY 1,2
)

SELECT
    REGION,
    FISCAL_YEAR,
    SALES,
    SALES-LAG(SALES) OVER(PARTITION BY REGION ORDER BY FISCAL_YEAR) AS YOY_CHANGE
FROM REGION_SALES
ORDER BY YOY_CHANGE;
businessContext: Regional managers want to identify underperforming markets and take corrective actions.
